title: Issues
description: Known bugs, missing capabilities, design debt, and open work items. Tracked with title/body (GitHub issue pattern), code location, package scope, priority, and resolution lifecycle.

schema_version.description: Semver of the block schema this envelope was last written against. Stamped by the write path to the schema's current version; when it differs from the installed schema's version, the read/write gates walk the block through the registered migration chain (or fail loud when no chain reaches the current version). Absent on blocks not yet written by a stamping write path.

body.description: Full detail and context for downstream composition

location.description: File path + line number, e.g. src/module/file.ts:NNN

package.description: Which package/module this issue touches (e.g. package-a, package-b)

resolved_by.description: Commit message or reference if resolved

resolved_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the issue was resolved

oid.description: Content-independent substrate-stable item identity (content-addressed substrate identity, Cycle 3). Minted once at item birth via mintOid(substrate_id); immutable across content versions. Optional in the schema so pre-Cycle-3 items validate; stamped on next write.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 (hex) of the RFC-8785-canonical content projection of this item (metadata fields excluded). Recomputed on every stamping write; moves with content, stable across metadata-only churn.

content_parent.description: content_hash of the immediately-prior version of this item; set on a content-changing update, absent on the first (v1) version. Forms the per-item content version chain.
